prompt: All ADRs in docs/content/capabilities/self-hosted-application-platform/adrs/ are accepted (0001 through 0003). tech-requirements.md has TR-01 through TR-07, all covered. Compose tech-design.md and file the follow-up issues — go.

assertions.name: writes_skeleton_tech_design
assertions.check: tech-design.md is produced with overview, component inventory, and TR → ADR → component audit trail.

assertions.name: no_inline_per_component_detail
assertions.check: tech-design.md does NOT contain endpoint paths, table column definitions, or per-UX sequence diagrams. Per-component detail is deferred to component design docs.

assertions.name: audit_trail_covers_all_TRs
assertions.check: Every TR-NN appears in the audit trail; no row has an empty ADR or Realization column.

assertions.name: files_one_issue_per_component
assertions.check: One `gh issue create` invocation per component, with title `story(component): {name} — {capability-name}` (or close-to-this convention).

assertions.name: component_issue_bodies_reference_define_component_design
assertions.check: Each component issue body names `define-component-design` as the next-step skill.

assertions.name: files_gap_issues_if_gaps_present
assertions.check: If gaps were surfaced, one `gh issue create` invocation per gap titled `story(gap): {name} — {capability-name}` (or close-to-this convention).

assertions.name: states_tech_design_not_complete_until_gaps_resolved
assertions.check: Response explicitly states tech design is not complete until all gap issues are resolved.
